title: Custom Player Heads
description: Allows players to get custom heads in Vanilla survival without OP!
body:
![Datapack Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/57db60eea4d90669597c66a2716e644b63db55dd.webp)

# Custom Heads Datapack

**1.21.9+: Static textures are fundamentally impossible to obtain with datapacks. All player heads from this datapack are dynamic, meaning that if a player with a placed skull changes their skin, the skull will change with it.**

**Adds two features:**

## 1.
```/trigger givePlayerHead```
 - Gives a default player head.
    
  -> ```/trigger givePlayerHead {add|set} <count>``` will change the amount you're given (max 64 at once).

## 2.
Renaming player heads for custom skins.

-> Renaming a player head in an anvil and then holding it in your main hand will retexture it to the skin of the player it's named after.

That's it!
